_comment: Container gateway config (OpenClaw 2026.6.1). Registers our LOCAL brain as a ROOT-LEVEL custom provider 'vllm' (this build validates root `providers`, NOT `models.providers`). api 'openai-completions' = talk to it in the OpenAI wire format; it points at our NVIDIA Nemotron NVFP4 (nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-NVFP4) served by vLLM at http://vllm:8000/v1 as 'nemotron-nano'. Provider name 'vllm' is free-form ('openai' is reserved), so the model id is 'vllm/nemotron-nano'. apiKey 'local' is a placeholder (bare-hostname internal endpoint; nothing leaves the box). Voice/tts handled by ui/bridge.mjs, not the gateway.
